title: Royal Guardian Tools
description: Add Royal Guardian Sword, Ultimate Tools and more...
body: **Area of Use: War & Defense ** ### Trinket is an optional mod. This mod provides you with a totem socket. Royal Guardian Tools 1.0.7 supports Trinket 3.7.2+. Lower versions have not been tested. The legendary Royal Guardian sword and Royal Guardian armors provide extra damage and durability against enemies. It possesses the world's most powerful swords, tools, and armor. New tools help players move faster in challenging areas or collect rare resources. Want to kill the game's most powerful creatures in one hit? Combine all armor pieces to form a set. Become immortal with extra effects. Using Just Enough Items (JEI) is recommended. **Royal Guardian Raw Ore found in the world between -50 and -30.** **Titanium Ore found in the world between -60 and -20.** **Uranium Ore found in the world between -60 and -20.** ![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd81b1746b030eba04c969287ff439100c6bca68.png) ![Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2b0ce29188d80b13bd26baf14441b3fdd70a159.png) ![Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d8a85ef9e7104e7687fe974885f8c0880ba39c4.png) ![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51a670f32ef9ed6888d390a668c284a8400341a9.png) ![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53cf235ce48b1e7c5c2736af3b9d1dd55d5cd68a.png) **Totem of Royal, protects you from death a 10 times.** ![Totem Of Royal](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_9a9327b6-5889-451c-9492-0c6c3b406abd.png) **Is the enchanted golden apple not enough? Here you go.** ![Emerald Apple](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_f80ea6d1-a910-4fd5-b9ac-5d199050522a.png) ![Enchanted Royal Apple](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_b40ec9f5-8f8d-4942-8a66-d66619af9ccf.png) **Armour and Tools** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_44cf6323-584d-479d-af3a-e34cef496112.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_48430bdf-8b5a-4323-88bc-1bca0bac845b.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_3d06ad26-d4b2-491f-864f-b0995ac47e30.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_54e93270-ec77-4056-b3ea-b3345e06f874.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_e8632dac-f49d-4b27-8356-536de212371f.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_4c1870da-b052-417c-a04e-c27cecf0f105.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_f717af6b-5cd3-4603-b9a3-8c02c60f6397.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_bc7669b6-8335-4407-9d7a-910d5a454637.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1388982/description_268a41c2-6a51-4418-ad2f-f34872036fd1.png)
